reviews.review_title: No option to turn off vignette
reviews.review_description: I have no issues with vr sickness and can't stand vignette when moving.  It ruins the immersion.   I get that apps do this by default but most games give you an option to disable it.  I looked all over and couldn't even find a settings menu and thus no way to turn it off.   So it is a deal breaker for me.   Sad because it looks like it would be cool
I was in tears. Its about helping animals. I just dont know what to say its just very good experience. And please keep updating it because it has very good potencial.
The most perfect way of show casing a world and what the impact the ocean has due to pollution

Can You Hear Me is a must-try VR experience for anyone who cares about the environment and the future of life on Earth. It will touch your heart and mind, and make you want to make a difference. I highly recommend it to everyone. 5 stars!
Love how the environment was made! Really makes me feel like underwater! Runs great on Quest 2! Congrats to the people involved!
Brilliant how this app manages to look mesmerizing and run smoothly on the Quest 2 device!
